scripts.dev: concurrently -n SERVER,WEB -c green,cyan "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run -w server build && npm run -w web build
scripts.build:exe: npm run build && pkg app.js -t node18-win-x64 -o lottery.exe
scripts.lint: npm run -w server lint && npm run -w web lint
scripts.typecheck: npm run -w server typecheck && npm run -w web typecheck
